properties.description: Predicting LLM Knowledge Performance from Reasoning Benchmarks: A From-Scratch Logistic Regression Approach
properties.readme_excerpt:
# Reasoning vs Memorization Classifier
## by Ujjwal Gupta 🫡

## Report

Full project report (PDF): [Ujjwal_Gupta_ML_report.pdf](Ujjwal_Gupta_ML_report.pdf)

---

LLMs get benchmarked constantly, but high scores don't always mean the model is actually reasoning.
This project asks a real question: can a model's reasoning benchmark performance predict how well
it does on GPQA (a graduate-level knowledge benchmark)?

We build a binary classifier to answer exactly that. No data leakage, no shortcuts

properties.description: Identifying pairs of flights that should not be part of the same pilot's sequence
properties.readme_excerpt:
# Airline Crew Sequence Risk Analysis

A data-driven framework for identifying airport pair sequences that are disproportionately likely to cause cascading weather-related delays for connecting crews. Built on BTS on-time performance data and real-time METAR weather observations.

## Problem

Airline crews often fly multi-leg sequences: **Airport A → DFW (hub) → Airport B**. When weather affects both legs simultaneously — or when a delay on the first leg propagates through the hub — the crew seq

properties.description: Guides blinds with vocal directions - HackUTD
properties.readme_excerpt:
# OptiqAid 👁️✨

> Bringing vision to life through the power of AI and iPhone technology

## 💡 Inspiration

Watching a blind friend navigate the world sparked an idea: what if we could use modern smartphone technology to help people see in new ways? OptiqAid was born from this simple yet powerful vision.

## 🌟 What It Does

OptiqAid transforms your iPhone into an intelligent visual assistant that understands the world around you. Using advanced camera technology and depth sensing, it provides

# HELOC Agent Web App

A sophisticated web application featuring voice and text chatbot integration with Vapi for a HELOC company offering credit cards. Built with Next.js, React, and modern UI components.

![Webapp](Webapp.png)
![Workflow](Aven-chatbot.png)

properties.description: AI friend directly with autonomous powers
properties.readme_excerpt:
# OpenAI Dakota 🤖

**OpenAI Dakota** is the more sentient autonomy stack for the browser. It fuses OpenAI's multimodal reasoning with Browserbase cloud sessions, Playwright automation, realtime vision, and an expressive avatar so Dakota can see the page, act on it, and respond like a living teammate.


![Graphic](vdakortaAvatar.png)

## 🌟 What makes Dakota different?
